rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing AGREE annex syntax errors first
Use only visible identifiers in repair clauses
Preserve existing component structure and connections during repair
Maintain component type contracts in type annexes and implementation contracts in implementation annexes
Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence for stateful equations
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in repair clauses
Preserve existing component structure and connections during repair
Maintain component type contracts in type annexes and implementation contracts in implementation annexes
Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence for stateful equations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
Branching logic should use nested `if ... then ... else`
Use AGREE logical operators such as `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and implication `=>`
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not add architecture to fix AGREE type errors; align helper declaration types with expressions or remove invalid clauses
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
